name: send_telegram
description: Send a text message or document to a Telegram chat. Accepts a custom message, or sends the latest newsletter article if no message is provided.

message.description: Text message to send. If omitted, sends the latest newsletter article as a document.

bot_token.description: Telegram bot token. Falls back to TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN env var.

chat_id.description: Telegram chat ID. Falls back to TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID env var.
